# Falcon Component Registry — DEEP (Brain SK canonical)

*** Source of truth: `C:/Falcon/Falcon/falcon-web-platform-ui` (branch `polishing-v0.4`) ***
*** Generated by Agent 7 merge — 2026-05-13 ***
*** 60 component folders under `Brain Outputs/component-registry/components/<name>/` (six files each) ***

Each row pairs the Angular wrapper, Stencil Shadow tag, Stencil Light tag, and the component-token file for one Falcon UI surface. Status = READY (use today) / NEEDS-UPGRADE (production-grade but missing capability) / DEPRECATED (kept as substrate only) / LEGACY (bespoke, kept while consumers migrate) / REFERENCE-ONLY (façade or stub, not for new code). Owner agent = which parallel agent produced the deep dossier.

Consumer counts come from grep against `apps/admin-console`, `apps/management-console`, `apps/host-shell/src/app` (production code), then `apps/host-shell/src/app/playground` + `apps/host-shell/src/app/falcon-ui-showcase` (lab pages), then `demos/` (excluded from bundle calculations per standing rule). Showcase/playground counts include both surfaces.

---

## Component count summary (Agent 7 final)

- **49 Angular wrappers** under `libs/falcon-ui-core/src/angular-wrapper/components/` (verified against live source).
- **47 Stencil component pairs** (Shadow + Light) under `libs/falcon-ui-core/src/components/` plus 1 Light-only (`falcon-organization-hierarchy-tree-tw`).
- **8 legacy bespoke Angular components** under `libs/falcon/src/shared-ui/lib/components/`: `falcon-calendar` (facade), `falcon-form-field`, `falcon-mobile-number` (facade), `falcon-multiselect` (stub), `falcon-photo-uploader`, `falcon-stepper` (legacy), `falcon-tree-panel`, `send-credentials-popup`.
- **46 component-token CSS files** under `libs/falcon-ui-tokens/src/components/`.
- **12 shared directives** under `libs/falcon/src/shared-ui/lib/directives/`.
- **1 `<falcon-angular-select>` alias** that re-exports `<falcon-angular-dropdown>`.
- **60 component folders generated** under `Brain Outputs/component-registry/components/<name>/` (with all 6 mandatory files each).

## Status breakdown

| Status | Count |
|---|---|
| READY | 22 |
| NEEDS-UPGRADE | 22 |
| DEPRECATED | 2 (dialog, toast) |
| LEGACY (kept while consumers migrate) | 7 (calendar-facade, form-field, mobile-number, photo-uploader, stepper-legacy, tree-panel, send-credentials-popup) |
| REFERENCE-ONLY | 2 (select alias, multiselect stub — both have zero consumers) |
| Total covered | 60 |

## Naming reconciliation

- Agent 1's `falcon-calendar` = the modern Stencil `<falcon-angular-calendar>`.
- Agent 4's `falcon-calendar-legacy` = the bespoke Angular facade.
- Agent 1's `falcon-form-field` = the legacy bespoke (only Agent 1 covered — Agent 4's duplicate was merged out).
- Agent 1's `falcon-multi-select` = the modern Stencil `<falcon-angular-multi-select>`.
- Agent 4's `falcon-multiselect-legacy` = the deprecated bespoke stub.
- Agent 4's `falcon-stepper` = the modern Stencil `<falcon-angular-stepper>`.
- Agent 4's `falcon-stepper-legacy` = the bespoke pre-Stencil stepper used by wizards.

## Recurring patterns (verified against live source)

- **Dual-render** — every modern wrapper has Shadow + Light DOM siblings with shared `falconXClasses()` helpers in `libs/falcon-ui-core/src/tailwind/`.
- **CVA on every form-control wrapper** except calendar / date-picker / search-input / grid-input (gap — see U4).
- **OnPush + signals** on every wrapper sampled.
- **Methods, not `computed()`** drive class strings on purpose (source comment in `falcon-input.component.ts:106-108`).
- **`useTailwind` `@Input` (default `true`)** toggles render path.
- **Per-instance token override** — host class + `--falcon-<component>-*` redeclaration.
- **Validation deferred** on uploader / single-uploader / OTP / phone-field / email-field — consumer drives state.
